project.name: Gia Phả (Họ Đào)
project.description: Family tree management app with AI-powered review tooling

review_cli: Claude Code CLI (Claude, -p broken on Windows)

patterns.name: MCP Bridge Architecture
patterns.description: codex_bridge_mcp.py acts as MCP server exposing 7 tools: codex_ask, codex_delegate, claude_ask, provide_context, get_session_status, run_codex_review, get_last_codex_review

patterns.name: Multi-AI Review Loop
patterns.description: 3 AI review: Codex + Claude + Antigravity. Dual mode (both available) or Single+Debate (one fails, Antigravity plays devil's advocate). Max 5 rounds.

gotchas.detail: subprocess.run with claude -p never returns. Even terminate() signal is ignored. Claude interactive mode works fine. This is a Claude CLI Windows bug.
gotchas.workaround: Use HTTP API via 9router (localhost:20128/v1/messages) instead of CLI

gotchas.issue: Antigravity proxy env conflicts with Claude CLI
gotchas.detail: Antigravity sets ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (dummy) and ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL (Cloud Run). Claude Code uses ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN via 9router (localhost:20128). Both present = auth conflict = hang.
gotchas.solution: Remove ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, read ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL and ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN from ~/.claude/settings.json

gotchas.issue: Prompt injection via positional CLI arg
gotchas.detail: Prompts starting with - parsed as CLI flags when passed as positional arg
gotchas.solution: Insert -- before prompt in command array

conventions.name: 9router config location
conventions.detail: Claude: ~/.claude/settings.json → env.ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL, env.ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN. Codex: uses --profile 9router flag.

conventions.name: Bridge registration
conventions.detail: Run scripts/register_antigravity_codex_bridge.ps1 after any bridge code change
